TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lutekay (路德會-Lutheran) == Pi'olid ni Matin Lute 1. Rayray no 'orip, likisi ato pakafana' to pitoor 2. O demak no pilihay. Masa Luther pifalic ko demak a milihay, pala Toic (Germany) a ponka ko pimisa. Misanga' to raradiwen no niyah, misanga' to 37 a radiw (ss 163. 320. 353). Luther i 1542 miheca 4 folad miteka pasadak to saka 1 fa'elohay sapahemak radiw, ilaloma ira ko 8 radiw, ira ko ni Luther a nisanga'an, pangangan sa: 3. Pahecian: (1)Kawasan tadamanay tamdaw: Malamo'ecelay ko paso'elinay. (2) Miliyokay to ciraraway tamdaw. (3) Masafa'inayan ko pinangan. (4) Tadengalay paso'elinay faloco' (ss 320). (5)Mikilim to so'elinay.
S.PHON: == ɾo~u~utəkaj (***-ɾo~u~utħəran) == piʡo~uɾiɬ~ɮ ni matin ɾo~u~utə *. rajraj no~u ʡo~urip, ɾikisi ato~u pakafanaʡ to~u pito~uo~ur *. o~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u piɾiħaj. masa ɾo~u~utħər pifaɾiʦ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak a miɾiħaj, paɾa to~uiʦ (*ərmanj) a po~unka ko~u pimisa. misaŋaʡ to~u raraɬ~ɮiwən no~u nijaħ, misaŋaʡ to~u ** a raɬ~ɮiw (ss ***. ***. ***). ɾo~u~utħər i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mitəka pasaɬ~ɮak to~u saka * faʡəɾo~uħaj sapaħəmak raɬ~ɮiw, iɾaɾo~uma ira ko~u * raɬ~ɮiw, ira ko~u ni ɾo~u~utħər a nisaŋaʡan, paŋaŋan sa: *. paħəʦian: (*)kawasan taɬ~ɮamanaj tamɬ~ɮaw: maɾamo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u paso~uʡəɾinaj. (*) miɾijo~ukaj to~u ʦirarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw. (*) masafaʡinajan ko~u pinaŋan. (*) taɬ~ɮəŋaɾaj paso~uʡəɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ (ss ***). (*)mikiɾim to~u so~uʡəɾinaj.
S.FORM: == Lutekay (路德會-Lutheran) == Pi'olid ni Matin Lute 1. Rayray no 'orip, likisi ato pakafana' to pitoor 2. O demak no pilihay. Masa Luther pifalic ko demak a milihay, pala Toic (Germany) a ponka ko pimisa. Misanga' to raradiwen no niyah, misanga' to 37 a radiw (ss 163. 320. 353). Luther i 1542 miheca 4 folad miteka pasadak to saka 1 fa'elohay sapahemak radiw, ilaloma ira ko 8 radiw, ira ko ni Luther a nisanga'an, pangangan sa: 3. Pahecian: (1)Kawasan tadamanay tamdaw: Malamo'ecelay ko paso'elinay. (2) Miliyokay to ciraraway tamdaw. (3) Masafa'inayan ko pinangan. (4) Tadengalay paso'elinay faloco' (ss 320). (5)Mikilim to so'elinay.
S.PHON: == ɾo~u~utəkaj (***-ɾo~u~utħəran) == piʡo~uɾiɬ~ɮ ni matin ɾo~u~utə *. rajraj no~u ʡo~urip, ɾikisi ato~u pakafanaʡ to~u pito~uo~ur *. o~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u piɾiħaj. masa ɾo~u~utħər pifaɾiʦ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak a miɾiħaj, paɾa to~uiʦ (*ərmanj) a po~unka ko~u pimisa. misaŋaʡ to~u raraɬ~ɮiwən no~u nijaħ, misaŋaʡ to~u ** a raɬ~ɮiw (ss ***. ***. ***). ɾo~u~utħər i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mitəka pasaɬ~ɮak to~u saka * faʡəɾo~uħaj sapaħəmak raɬ~ɮiw, iɾaɾo~uma ira ko~u * raɬ~ɮiw, ira ko~u ni ɾo~u~utħər a nisaŋaʡan, paŋaŋan sa: *. paħəʦian: (*)kawasan taɬ~ɮamanaj tamɬ~ɮaw: maɾamo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u paso~uʡəɾinaj. (*) miɾijo~ukaj to~u ʦirarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw. (*) masafaʡinajan ko~u pinaŋan. (*) taɬ~ɮəŋaɾaj paso~uʡəɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ (ss ***). (*)mikiɾim to~u so~uʡəɾinaj.
